$schema_note: Central config for the team-portfolio plugin. Lives at the ROOT of your hub repo (the repo that holds the reports + dashboard). Secrets are NEVER stored here — the token is read from the environment (PORTFOLIO_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN / GH_TOKEN). Schema reference: plugins/team-portfolio/knowledge/multi-repo-tracking-model.md in the RavenClaude marketplace.
_TODO_repos: Replace the empty repos[] with every owner/name to track. Example: "mcorbett51090/RavenClaude". Public OR private (private needs PORTFOLIO_TOKEN with read access).
_TODO_team: Replace the empty team[] with one entry per person: {"login": "github-username", "name": "Full Name", "role": "lead|contributor|..."}. Role is free-form.
_TODO_supervisor: Optional. Add a top-level "supervisor": {"login": "...", "name": "..."} to frame the weekly tracker as a manage-the-team view.
_TODO_projects: Optional. Replace the empty projects[] with cross-repo project definitions. Each: {"name": "Project", "match": {"repos": [...], "labels": [...], "title_prefixes": [...]}}. Any one match field is enough.
_TODO_cleanup: Delete every "_TODO_*" key once you've filled the real arrays. The collector ignores them, but they're noise.
